# mcp-vscode screenshot drop

The four screenshots referenced by
[docs/getting-started/mcp-with-vscode.md](../../getting-started/mcp-with-vscode.md)
live here once captured:

- `01-api-key.png` — Cordum dashboard Settings → API Keys panel.
- `02-extension.png` — VS Code Extensions panel showing the
  installed MCP extension.
- `03-mcp-panel.png` — VS Code MCP panel listing cordum as a
  connected server.
- `04-tool-call.png` — VS Code chat panel surfacing a cordum
  tool-call result.

Same capture contract as `docs/static/img/mcp-claude-code/` — a
human tester drives the onboarding cold-test and commits the PNGs
alongside the filled-in report at
`docs/mcp/cold-tests/<date>-vscode-<tester>.md`.
